zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau於大約0970年出生在德國艾爾薩斯-洛斯林根貝可 洛斯林根可萊斯 梅斯時，他的父親Otto von Worms I, Herzog von Kärnten24歲，母親Judith von Bayern Herzogin von Kärnten22歲。他於0986年與Adelheid von Metz結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於0997年3月28日享年28歲，埋葬在德國貝也弗蘭肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau于大约0970年出生在德国艾爾薩斯-洛斯林根貝可 洛斯林根可萊斯 梅斯时，他的父亲Otto von Worms I, Herzog von Kärnten24岁，母亲Judith von Bayern Herzogin von Kärnten22岁。他于0986年与Adelheid von Metz结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于0997年3月28日享年28岁，埋葬在德国貝也弗蘭肯。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Speyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the German city of Speyer in Rhineland-Palatinate (see   Spier   4), which had a large Jewish population in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Speier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Heinz, Kurt, Siegbert, Berthold, Erna, Hans, Manfred.

variants.name: Speer
meanings: German and Dutch: from Middle High German, Middle Dutch sper ‘spear’, hence a nickname for a tall, thin person, or else for a skilled user of the hunting spear. In part, it may also have been a metonymic occupational name for a maker of spears.
German: nickname for someone thought to resemble a sparrow, Middle High German spar(e) ‘sparrow’.

variants.name: Shapiro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Isadore, Emanuel, Myer, Ari, Yaakov, Yakov, Moshe.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from the Yiddish name of the German city of Speyer (see   Speyer  ). Compare   Sapiro   and   Spiro  .
History: This is one of the old Ashkenazic surnames. In Eastern Europe, it was used by rabbinical families well before the mass adoption of surnames by local Jews at the turn of the 19th century.

variants.name: Spier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erhardt, Gerd, Ewald, Ilse, Kurt, Monika, Otto.
English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English spier(e) ‘spy, watchman, scout’ (Old French espierre, espieur).

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau was born about 0970, in Metz, Lothringen, Alsace-Lorraine, Germany, his father, Otto von Worms I, Herzog von Kärnten, was 24 and his mother, Judith von Bayern Herzogin von Kärnten, was 22. He married Adelheid von Metz in 0986. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 28 March 0997, at the age of 28, and was buried in Franken, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau est né environ 0970, à Kreis Metz, Lorraine, Alsace-Lorraine, Allemagne, son père, Otto von Worms I, Herzog von Kärnten, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Judith von Bayern Herzogin von Kärnten, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Adelheid von Metz en 0986. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 mars 0997, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterré à Franken, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.Metz, Alsace-Lorraine, Germany: Kreis Metz, Bezirk Lothringen, Elsaß-Lothringen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau um 0970 in Kreis Metz, Bezirk Lothringen, Elsaß-Lothringen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto von Worms I, Herzog von Kärnten 24 und seine Mutter Judith von Bayern Herzogin von Kärnten 22. Er hat 0986 Adelheid von Metz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. März 0997 im Alter von 28 Jahren und wurde in Franken, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau è nato il circa 0970 nel Kreis Metz, Bezirk Lothringen, Elsaß-Lothringen, Germania, il suo padre, Otto von Worms I, Herzog von Kärnten, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Judith von Bayern Herzogin von Kärnten, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Adelheid von Metz nel 0986. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 marzo 0997, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolto a Franken, Bayern, Germania.

ko.Metz, Alsace-Lorraine, Germany: 독일 엘사ss-로스링 베지르크 로스링 크레이스 멧즈
ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau(이)가 대략 0970년 독일 엘사ss-로스링 베지르크 로스링 크레이스 멧즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto von Worms I, Herzog von Kärnten(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith von Bayern Herzogin von Kärnten(은)는 22세였다. 그는 0986년 Adelheid von Metz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0997년 3월 28일 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 프랭켄에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau nasceu aproximadamente 0970, em Kreis Metz, Bezirk Lothringen, Elsaß-Lothringen, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto von Worms I, Herzog von Kärnten, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Judith von Bayern Herzogin von Kärnten, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelheid von Metz em 0986. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de março de 0997, com 28 anos, e foi sepultado em Franken, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.Metz, Alsace-Lorraine, Germany: крис мец, безирк лотринген, элсаss-лотринген, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau родился около 0970 г. в местности крис мец, безирк лотринген, элсаss-лотринген, Германия, его отцу по имени Otto von Worms I, Herzog von Kärnten было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Judith von Bayern Herzogin von Kärnten, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelheid von Metz в 0986 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 марта 0997 г. в возрасте 28 лет и был похоронен в местности фрэнкен, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich von Speyer Graf im Wormsgau nació aproximadamente 0970, en Kreis Metz, Bezirk Lothringen, Elsaß-Lothringen, Alemania, su papá, Otto von Worms I, Herzog von Kärnten, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Judith von Bayern Herzogin von Kärnten, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Adelheid von Metz en 0986. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de marzo de 0997, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultado en Franken, Bayern, Alemania.
